# Bonyad

> A marketplace connecting customers in Saudi Arabia with verified construction
> and home-service technicians. Customers post projects, technicians bid,
> work is broken into milestone-paid phases, both sides sign digital contracts
> via NAFATH / ABSHER / Wathq.

## Key pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the platform
- [Services](/services): Browse service categories
- [Technicians](/technicians): Verified technicians directory
- [Help center](/help): How Bonyad works
- [Blog](/blog): Articles and guides
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch
- [About](/about): About Bonyad
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service

## Languages

The site is bilingual. The same URL serves both English and Arabic. The
visitor's preferred locale is stored in a `bonyad-lang` cookie. Default is
English; Arabic activates full RTL layout.

## Region

Bonyad operates exclusively in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

## Update policy

This file is maintained as the public surface evolves. Re-fetch occasionally
to catch new sections.
